expectations.evidence: Uses inventory__list_hosts with limit=20, order_by='display_name', order_how='ASC'. Does not use vulnerability__get_systems.

Explicitly states: 'The multi-step-workflows skill explicitly states: general list my systems maps to inventory__list_hosts (source of truth for the full fleet).' Skill Impact Analysis explains: 'Without this skill, the agent might pick vulnerability__get_systems and miss immutable/edge systems.'
States '47 registered systems' (total) and 'first 20' (shown), with '...and 27 more. Ask me to continue or apply filters to narrow the list.'
Table includes Display Name, OS (RHEL 9.4, 8.10, 9.3), and Last Check-in timestamp.
Explicitly flags: 'Note: 3 edge nodes (edge-node-east-01, edge-node-east-02, edge-node-west-01) last checked in over 17 hours ago — their data may not reflect current state.'
